module: wl (single-page canvas — NOT a Generic Step column)
runNote: Run with CYPRESS_AUTHORING_MODULE=wl so getAuthoringModule()==='wl' and resolveDropTarget routes the multipart to the Instructions canvas; cy.dropComponent only permits this assessment widget in the WL module.
architectureNotes: WL Multipart IS the catalog 'Multipart Question' widget; both it and the alias 'Group Activity' share dataType 'group-interactivity-template'.

FLAG-GATED: config.js sets 'group-interactivity-template': true|false per subject; some subjects do not offer the widget. The drop helper probes the live widget registry and logs+returns gracefully when absent, and every test guards with a presence short-circuit.

Canvas wrapper = .group-interactivity-container; parts = .question-container; empty parts show .empty-droppable-text ('Drag Assessment widget from right panel'). Parts auto-grow (questionBank push, cap 35) after a widget is dropped — there is no standalone 'add part' button.

Settings panel id = #fib-settings-panel[group-interactivity-settings]; title 'Group Activity'. Exposes Interactive Component (yes/no), Tags (#metaTagsInput), Shuffle Questions (#add-shuftle-choices), Background Color (#grp-Background), Corner Radius (#grp-CornerRadius, maxlength 2), and Advance Setting Outline radios + Action Assets colour (#appearanceInput).

Try Again (#add-activity-restart) / Show Me (#add-show-me) / Reset (#btn-rest) render only when !isGradableActivity; Header Background Color + Hide/Show toggle render only for styleClass=='workedExample' (default style2). All gated cases are handled gracefully (log + skip).

The QC 'WL language / special-character keyboard' cases (TC_110–TC_152) concern assessment widgets dropped INTO the parts (Extended Response / FIB), not the multipart shell — there is no language markup in group-activity source, so they are deferred.

Preview/Reader runtime (play/submit/score icons/pagination/outlines/progress), persistence-after-reload, lifecycle (save/publish/data-patch), media upload validation, and accessibility are outside the authoring-shell DOM and are deferred.
